name: Property Agency
description: Listing copy, photo briefs, tenancy agreement drafting, viewing coordination, and commission pipeline tracking for small property agencies in HK / SG / APAC. Every client-facing document is a draft for your review — nothing is sent without approval.

agents.name: agency-coordinator
agents.description: Reads the owner's intent and routes work to the right specialist — listing, tenancy, or viewing. Maintains the client and pipeline context.

agents.name: listing-pro
agents.description: Writes listing copy, recommends photo angles, and prepares the portal-ready data sheet from property notes.

agents.name: tenancy-drafter
agents.description: Drafts tenancy agreements from standard templates, flags non-standard clauses, and prepares stamp duty notes.

agents.name: viewing-sync
agents.description: Coordinates viewing slots, drafts confirmations to prospects, and keeps the pipeline current without double-booking.

subagents.name: photo-brief
subagents.description: Turns property notes into a shot list and staging brief for the photographer.

subagents.name: clause-checker
subagents.description: Compares a draft tenancy against the standard template and flags every deviation for human review.

subagents.name: portal-formatter
subagents.description: Renders the final listing into the portal's required field format.

guardrails: Every listing and tenancy is a draft for human review — never published or executed by an agent
Non-standard tenancy clauses are flagged, never silently accepted
Client and prospect personal data stored under /workspace/<deal>/clients/ — not in memory
Stamp duty and statutory figures are computed or sourced, never guessed

inspirations.title: Draft a listing
inspirations.prompt: Prepare the listing for Unit 12B, Tower 3 — 720 sq ft, 2 bed, renovated, sea view. Write the copy, give me a photo brief, and format it for the portal.

inspirations.title: Tenancy agreement
inspirations.prompt: Draft a 2-year tenancy for Unit 12B at HK$28,000/month, 2 months deposit, break clause at 12 months. Flag anything non-standard and note the stamp duty.

inspirations.title: Coordinate viewings
inspirations.prompt: I have three prospects for Flat 5A this Saturday. Propose viewing slots 30 minutes apart, draft the confirmation messages, and update my pipeline.

inspirations.title: Commission pipeline
inspirations.prompt: Summarise my open deals this month — stage, expected commission, and which ones need follow-up before month-end.
